op.update-im-history
does virtual mobile number can received bank verification via Whatsapp ?

That's an interesting question! Virtual mobile numbers can often receive SMS messages, but whether they can receive bank verification codes via WhatsApp depends on the specific bank and their policies. Some banks may allow verification through WhatsApp, while others may only send codes via SMS to regular mobile numbers. 

Could you let me know which bank you are referring to? That way, I might be able to provide more specific information!

Hi Putu, how may I help you?
Hi Sandy, could you let me know , does CINNOx can received bank verification via Whatsapp ?

to receive bank verificaiton via WhatsApp, you need to use the number to register WhatsApp first. However, you can only register WhatsApp Business API account, which monthly charge occurs. It might not be worth it for personal use
I need tu pruchase virtual mobile number Hong Kong
need to make sure whether can received OTP via SMS and Whatsapp?
Hong Kong number can. However, please note that if the bank uses non-regular sender ID to send the OTP, it might not be received.
WhatsApp..I will say the chance is slim
i dont understand non regulard sender ID
what I meant is, our Hong Kong number can recieve SMS. The exception is, if the bank send an OTP in a non-regular format, then we cannot receive it
what is the regular format OTP that CINNOX receive?
it's  'numbers'. we cannot control
so I cannot say that you can 100% get the OTP, but most of the customer receive MSS OTP using Hong Kong number
typo SMS
so what I need to to is just forward it the virtual number to my device/phone number right ?
nope
you have to check the message on our platform called CINNOX

when you purchase a number, an account will open for you
https://servicehub.cinnox.com/buy-virtual-number
the requirement is that we need a company registration, ID of person in charge and a utility bill which indicate it's a valid company.
yes, I saw the link, I meant how easy the set up in my phone ?
it's not a sim card, so it will not be in your phone
you can only check the OTP on CINNOX
using the browser

but why point no. 2. Set Your Call Receiving Preferences
Where would you like to receive calls? - I put : Phone
that's for call service, you can set your phone as destination so that when someone calls the virtual number, the call will be directed to your phone
but not SMS
so how to know if there is incoming SMS if I don't open CONNOX ?
I meant is there notification to my phone?
then you cannot see the message. there won't be a notification
virtual number is unlike sim card, so it works differently
so, i need to stay login to CInnox to monitor, like that ?
yes, when you trigger the OTP, you have to log in CINNOX to check
understood, and for Whatsapp is not work right ?
OTP by SMS only
chances are slimmer but you can try since you purchase a virtual number already.
not purchase yet
if you get a number, then you can try both SMS and WhatsApp
why you asked me to try Whatsapp? meant some can and some can't ?
correct..
some people get the OTP from banks, some from Facebook..the origins varies
this will be from bank
still, the Hong Kong number has the ability to receive SMS, but not 100% guaranteed, depending on the sender
so far, there are 1 among of around 8 who fail to receive it
is there a contract for virtual number ?

it's subscription based together with CINNOX. It will be on a monthly basis.

https://docs.cinnox.com/docs/master-service-agreement
thank you
no problem. Feel free to let us know should you have any questions :)
Thank you Sandy, have agreat day
you too!
